title.en: Obviously, in terms of will, these other side l...

content.en:
The comprehensive index of the will of other other Shore-level geniuses is about 100 to 500, and the gap is not very large, and there is no Other-level genius whose comprehensive index is less than 100.

Obviously, in terms of will, these other side level geniuses will not be bad.

"Endless Lord, Will Composite Index 1022!"

This composite index is spoken by the Lord of the White Capital.

Suddenly, the other other shore-level geniuses were all surprised.

Another composite index has broken 1,000!

"The comprehensive index of will exceeds a thousand, and the will of the Endless Lord must have reached the will of the Origin Realm, otherwise it is impossible to break a thousand!"

The Lord of Hiiragi and the other other geniuses thought to themselves.

Eight times of bone transformation realm cultivation, you will raise your will to the will of the origin realm, which is very difficult to do!

And Ye Tian did it!

Of course.

The Composite Index of Willpower is less important, not as important as the Composite Index of the Body and the Composite Index of the Other Side.

But Ye Tian is now more than 1,000 in both the body and the will index, which is terrifying!

Subsequently.

Ye Tian and the others were taken to another place by the Lord of the White Capital to conduct the composite index test on the other side.

In the midst of a void.

Ye Tian came here.

At this time, an inexplicable force poured into the body.

The rules of his origin on the other side were perceived, and there was also a magic technique on the other side, all of which turned into imprints and appeared in the void.

The imprints of the golden text on the other side and the black text on the other side are also presented.

Soon, the test was over, and he walked out.

After that, after the other other shore-level geniuses were tested, the Lord of the White Capital announced the Shore Composite Index.

Soon.

The tests of the other other geniuses are over.

At this time, the Lord of the White Capital announced the composite index of the other side of the world.

Most of the other shore-level geniuses have two or three hundred composite indexes, and the other shore-level geniuses like the Lord of Tiandu have a comprehensive index of 688, which is a very high comprehensive index of the other side.

And Ye Tian's other side of the composite index is still announced in the last place.

The other other Shore-level geniuses all thought that Ye Tian's Shore's Composite Index was very high, and in fact it was.

"Endless Lord, the Composite Index of the Other Side is 1090!"

The composite index broke another thousand!

At this moment, all the other side level geniuses were shocked.

And those island owners were also extremely excited.

The three composite indices all broke 1,000, and Fengya Island couldn't remember how long it had been since it had recruited such a genius from the other side.

......

The composite index of all the other side level geniuses is sent to the hands of each island owner, and the selection of other side level geniuses will soon be carried out.

Now.

After the owner of Fengya Island received this batch of comprehensive index data of the other side-level geniuses, they all stared at Ye Tian's data.

"This group of other shore-level geniuses still has such a demonic genius, this guy, I want it!"

"Hahaha, I must recruit the Lord of Endless into my island!"

"Hurry over there, lest you be snatched away by other island owners!"

An incomparably powerful island owner has come from all over the island.

Windtooth Island is also not large, so the islands arrived here almost instantaneously.

Next, it's time to pick a genius from the other side.

"Lord of Endless, would you like to enter my Taiheng Island?"

"Lord of Endless, would you like to enter my Jiuhong Island?"

"Lord of Endless, I am ranked eleventh among the many island owners of Wind Tooth Island, join my island, and I will give you a very high treatment!"

The eleventh place of the owner!

Ye Tian looked at the other party, this is the Lord of Zhenlin, and his island is called Zhenlin Island!

At this time, another island master said: "Lord of Zhenlin, your strength is indeed the eleventh among many island masters, but you are very poor, your cultivation consumes too many resources, and you are not enough, and the resources mastered by Zhenlin Island can also be used for your own cultivation, and there are not many resources for cultivating members of Zhenlin Island." Even if you give a lot of resources to the Endless Lord at the beginning, then in the later stage, the resources will not be supplied, and the cultivation speed will have to be reduced a lot!

The Lord of True Lin smiled awkwardly, but did not refute.

Obviously, his Zhenlin Island is really poor.

Zhenlin Island alone was very poor, so Ye Tian gave up Zhenlin Island.

These island owners kept arguing, and the other other shore-level geniuses gave up.

The other other shore-level geniuses were suddenly a little envious and jealous, if they were treated like this, how good it would be!

Now.

Ye Tian was also hesitating, not knowing which island to choose to join.

That's when it happened.

A woman appeared in front of Ye Tian.

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

"Lord of Ice and Rain!"

One of the island owners shouted very politely.

"Lord of Endless, I want it from Icy Rain Island, do you have any opinions?"

The Lord of Ice and Rain said in a delicate voice.

"No comment!"

One by one, the other owners shook their heads.

Even the Lord of the White Capital didn't dare to refute it, and he didn't fight with the Lord of Ice and Rain.

"Lord of Infinity, you will enter my Isle of Frost and Rain!"

This is not an inquiry, but a direct decision.

Ye Tian doesn't have the right to choose, but even if he is given a choice, he will choose Ice Rain Island!

Without him, just because this Lord of Ice and Rain is powerful, the other island owners dare not refute.

Obviously, the strength of this Lord of Ice Rain is extremely strong, and Ice Rain Island should be rich as well.

Therefore, joining Rain Island is definitely the wisest choice.

In this way, Ye Tian was chosen by Frost Rain Island.

After that, the other island owners began to select other other geniuses.

It didn't take long for the thirty-six other shore-level geniuses to be selected.

......

"Come with me!"

The Lord of Ice and Rain shouted.

Ye Tian immediately followed the Lord of Ice Rain to Ice Rain Island.

Rain Island is located on an island in the core of Fengya Island, which is relatively large and has a good geographical location.

After coming to Freezing Rain Island, the Lord of Freezing Rain explained some things to Ye Tian.

"Lord of Endless, let me introduce myself first!"

Lord of Ice and Rain:

"I am the Lord of Ice and Rain on Wind Tooth Island, and I am the number one among many island owners. Except for those few Origin Origin Realms, my strength is the strongest among the Origin Middle Realm!"

The most powerful Origin Realm!

Ye Tian knew what this meant, and the Lord of Chaos was far from being able to compare!

Entering the Ice Rain Island, nature is the best choice.

Then.

The Lord of Ice Rain continued: "Lord of Endless, there are various inheritances on Ice Rain Island, you can look at them casually, as for your reward treatment, I will give it to you later!"

"Let's talk about the situation on Frost Rain Island, now Frost Rain Island has a total of eighteen members, except for you, the other members are all in the Origin Realm!"

Seventeen Origin Realm!

The strength of Frost Island is really strong!
